name: Pucchiemon

signature_move.name: Heartner Beam
signature_move.description: Releases a soft light that causes a loss of fighting spirit and soothes the hearts of its enemies.

description: An Armor-level Fairy Digimon which evolved through the power of the " Digimental of Kindness ". Owning a whimsical personality, it loves to have its head stroked and to share secrets with others, and can be found singing songs when in a good mood. However, it hates having its tail touched, and it will fall into a foul mood and refuse to listen to you if you keep trying. Its power isn't strong, but it has the strange ability to becalm its opponents. Furthermore, Pucchiemon of a green color are known to exist, but their numbers are very low, so their presence is considered to be quite valuable. Its Special Move releases a soft light that causes a loss of fighting spirit and soothes the hearts of its enemies ( Heartner Beam ).
